title: Rebrand platform as 'Memu Nerchukunnam' with shareable public access

requirements.text: Update the app's brand name throughout the frontend to 'Memu Nerchukunnam' (మేము నేర్చుకున్నాం). This includes the site title in index.html, the header/navbar brand display in Layout.tsx, the About page hero, and any other locations where the current platform name appears.

quotes: create a shareable and usable by everyone website name like memu nerchukunnam

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'Memu Nerchukunnam'
The sticky header displays 'Memu Nerchukunnam' as the brand name
The About page hero section reflects the new brand name
All instances of the old platform name are replaced consistently

requirements.text: Add a prominent 'Share This Website' section or button on the Home page and About page that allows visitors to share the platform URL via WhatsApp, copy link to clipboard, and the native Web Share API — so any user can easily spread the site to others.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Share This Website' UI element is visible on the Home page
A 'Share This Website' UI element is visible on the About page
WhatsApp share opens a pre-filled message with the site URL and name
Copy link button copies the root URL to clipboard and shows a confirmation
Native Web Share API is triggered on supported devices

requirements.text: Remove or make optional the year-selection onboarding modal (YearSelectionModal) so that first-time visitors who arrive via a shared link can immediately browse all posts without being blocked by a required gate. Year selection should remain accessible but non-blocking (e.g., as an optional profile step).
acceptanceCriteria: A user who opens the site via a shared link can browse posts without being forced to select a year first
Year selection is still available (e.g., as a banner prompt or optional modal trigger)
Existing users who have already selected a year are not affected

requirements.text: Update the English and Telugu translation strings in frontend/src/translations/index.ts to reflect the new brand name 'Memu Nerchukunnam' and update the tagline/description copy on the Home and About pages to emphasize that this is an open, community-shared learning platform for all students.
acceptanceCriteria: Translation keys referencing the old brand name are updated to 'Memu Nerchukunnam'
Home page hero tagline reflects the community/open-sharing theme
About page mission statement mentions open access for all students

requirements.text: Ensure the backend actor in backend/main.mo does not require any form of authentication to read posts or college connect tips. All read (query) functions — getAllPosts, getPostsByCategory, getStats, getAllCollegeConnects — must be publicly accessible without Internet Identity login.
acceptanceCriteria: getAllPosts returns data without requiring a logged-in identity
getPostsByCategory returns data without requiring a logged-in identity
getStats returns data without requiring a logged-in identity
getAllCollegeConnects returns data without requiring a logged-in identity

constraints: Do not remove or alter files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not break existing post creation, upvoting, or wishlist functionality
Internet Identity login must remain available for users who wish to contribute posts
nonGoals: Changing the underlying data model or backend schema
Translating all UI copy to Telugu (bilingual support already exists)
Redesigning the visual theme or color palette

required: Warm, welcoming logo mark for 'Memu Nerchukunnam' — a stylized open book with a graduation cap and a subtle Telugu script flourish, on a transparent background (memu-logo.dim_256x256.png)
